displayName: Sovereign Router X Pricing and Unit Economics

symbols.R: Average routed requests per customer per month
symbols.H: Average professional service hours per customer
symbols.I: Average inference cost per routed request
symbols.O: Average validation and orchestration cost per request
symbols.S: Average replay and storage cost per request
symbols.A: Average governance and assurance cost per review
symbols.N: Average knowledge service cost per update
symbols.T: Average professional service cost per hour
symbols.P: Average support and observability cost per customer
symbols.B: Base platform subscription price per customer
symbols.Q: Governance and assurance fee per review

models.packaging: Low-entry monthly plan with modest usage allowance
models.marginDriver: High subscription share and low support overhead

models.packaging: Small base fee plus metered requests and storage
models.marginDriver: Good for variable workloads but requires tight usage controls

models.packaging: Optional governance add-on for compliance-sensitive solo users
models.valueFocus: Evidence and replay for important work
models.marginDriver: Higher margin if assurance is standardized

models.packaging: Not the default fit for this segment
models.valueFocus: Reserved for contractor or regulated solo deployments
models.marginDriver: Usually overspecified unless compliance is mandatory

models.packaging: Tiered workspace plan with elevated usage caps
models.marginDriver: Strong balance of recurring revenue and manageable support

models.packaging: Lower base fee with metered request bundles
models.marginDriver: Useful when volume is uncertain but margin control is essential

models.packaging: Workflow assurance add-on with evidence retention
models.marginDriver: Can lift ARPU without heavy inference exposure

models.packaging: Consultant-grade package with controlled routing and reporting
models.valueFocus: Premium positioning for independent operators serving enterprise clients
models.marginDriver: Highest willingness to pay when compliance matters

models.packaging: Seat-based team plan with shared workspace and admin controls
models.marginDriver: Efficient when seat growth outpaces support growth

models.packaging: Seat minimum plus metered workflow activity
models.marginDriver: Good if team usage varies but can pressure margin at scale

models.packaging: Evidence, policy, and audit bundle for shared governance
models.marginDriver: Fits team governance budgets with sticky retention

models.packaging: Team bundle with support, reporting, and private routing options
models.marginDriver: Best when bundled support offsets heavier servicing

models.packaging: Platform subscription with minimum annual commitment
models.marginDriver: Stable recurring base that funds service delivery

models.packaging: Commitment plus metered overage
models.marginDriver: Useful for large tenants with bursty workloads

models.packaging: Conformance, policy, audit, and evidence bundle
models.marginDriver: Strong margin if standardized and repeatable

models.packaging: Private deployment, support, assurance, and services bundle
models.marginDriver: Best fit for regulated or mission-critical deployments

models.packaging: Contracted platform fee with procurement terms
models.marginDriver: Works when contract size is predictable

models.packaging: Metered usage with spend controls and reporting
models.marginDriver: Requires tight caps and transparent reporting

models.packaging: Compliance, evidence, and audit package
models.marginDriver: Often a separate line item with strong justification

models.packaging: Private deployment with support and implementation profile
models.marginDriver: Preferred when procurement wants one accountable vendor
